title: match_only_filter behaves inconsistently for regex vs plain filters
body: match_only_filter downcases file_url before a plain substring check, but doesn't do the same normalization before matching against a regex built from only_filter via to_regex, so case sensitivity differs depending on whether the filter looks like a regex.

title: threads_count of 0 hangs the downloader silently
body: When threads_count ends up 0 in initialize (e.g. an unset --threads option), the download loop never spawns any worker threads and the process hangs indefinitely with no output or error.

title: backup_path directory isn't created before writing files
body: backup_path builds a directory string like 'websites/example.com/' but nothing calls mkdir_p on it before the first file write, causing an Errno::ENOENT the first time a fresh site is downloaded.

title: maximum_pages default of 100 isn't documented
body: initialize defaults @maximum_pages to 100 when it isn't passed in, but neither this default nor what a 'page' means for archive_api's pagination is explained anywhere in the code or README.
